task_completion.description: Create a new IFC4 project in BlenderBIM/Bonsai
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blender interface showing Bonsai/BlenderBIM add-on active, with a new IFC project initialized (e.g., IFC Project structure visible in the Outliner).

task_completion.description: Create at least one IfcColumn element
task_completion.visual_evidence: A column-like 3D object visible in the viewport, and the Outliner or Object Properties indicating it is classified as an IfcColumn.

task_completion.description: Assign a material containing 'Concrete' to the column
task_completion.visual_evidence: Material properties panel showing a material assigned to the column with 'Concrete' (case-insensitive) in its name.

task_completion.description: Create at least six IfcReinforcingBar elements embedded within the column
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least six reinforcing bar objects (e.g., 4 vertical bars and 2 horizontal ties) visible in the 3D viewport, classified as IfcReinforcingBar in the Outliner.

task_completion.description: Assign a material containing 'Steel' or 'Rebar' to the reinforcing bars
task_completion.visual_evidence: Material properties panel showing a material assigned to the rebars with 'Steel' or 'Rebar' (case-insensitive) in its name.
Blender's export/save dialog, an info notification, or a file manager showing 'column_reinforcement.ifc' being saved in the '/home/ga/BIMProjects/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the Blender GUI to create the model
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active use of Blender's graphical interface (viewport, outliner, properties) rather than terminal commands or text editors generating the IFC file.

integrity.description: The reinforcing bars are actual 3D objects embedded in the column
integrity.visual_evidence: The rebars appear as actual 3D geometry (e.g., cylinders or swept profiles) positioned within or around the column, not just empty objects or renamed default cubes.

integrity.description: The agent created the project from scratch
integrity.visual_evidence: Early screenshots show the creation process from an empty scene or default startup, rather than just opening a finished file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is /home/ga/BIMProjects/column_reinforcement.ifc. The model must contain at least 1 IfcColumn and at least 6 IfcReinforcingBar elements. The column must have a material with 'Concrete' in its name, and the rebars must have a material with 'Steel' or 'Rebar' in its name.
